title: Spiced Twilight
description: Make TwilightForest mod more spice up!
body:
## Spiced Twilight

![Maze Slime Beetle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yTxJOVPq/images/4a21a088700fecd8a9d4784e79b3e31fef51c3f9.png)

(This mod requires [Twilight Forest](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest) Mod!)

This addon make "spice up" Twilight Forest mod's monsters

It make to Unique Experience with modern combat!

## What will Include?
- maze slime variant of slime beetle(spawn in Labyrinth)
- helmet crab hide to helmet
- kobalt now has equip helmet(biome specific!)
- sometime baby kobold spawn
- naga is now attack with jump!
- twilight lich now make remain some skeleton druid when absorb some lich minion
